conversation_id.description: Stable public identifier for one generated conversation.

persona_code.description: One of the 32 SLOAN persona codes used for conditioning.

persona_description.description: Natural-language description of the assigned SLOAN persona.

trait_adjectives.description: Trait-level adjectives used to describe the assigned persona.

clickstream_summary.description: Natural-language summary of the public clickstream evidence used to guide generation.

conversation.description: Generated e-commerce dialogue conditioned on the persona and clickstream summary.
